channel.title: Lx8 Labs — Insights
channel.description: Field notes from the lab. DevOps post-mortems, AI experiments, paper breakdowns. Once or twice a month.
channel.copyright: © 2013–2026 Lx8 Labs · Founded by Alexei Ferreira

item.title: 13 years of DevOps consulting: eight lessons
item.dc:creator: Alexei Ferreira
item.description: What I'd tell my 2013 self about running a one-person DevOps consultancy. Sell outcomes not hours, the first two weeks decide everything, charge for thinking, write the runbook before the deploy, hire your replacement, and three more.

item.title: Building a 3D algorithm visualizer in pure HTML
item.dc:creator: Alexei Ferreira
item.description: A single 2,000-line HTML file. Three.js, ~350 lines of CSS, vanilla JavaScript. No npm, no bundler, no framework. Hosted on GitHub Pages for $0. The result is faster, smaller, and arguably better than what most teams ship after sprinting through React + Vite for a week. Here's the case for choosing constraints.
